agent_definition.precedence_decision: shared definition used because no repository-local reviewer definition was found

overall_feature_completeness: Substantially complete on sizing, centering, tests, and documentation, but not yet fully complete because ScenarioDialog no longer preserves the expected BattleSim modal hide/show lifecycle and the tactical regression suite fails.

blocking.title: ScenarioDialog tactical launches dropped the expected hide/show modal lifecycle
blocking.why_it_matters: Subtask 3 required preserving existing modal ownership/lifecycle behavior while fixing sizing. The merged branch removed the Hide()/Show() contract around the four FBattleScreen modal launches, and reviewer validation showed this now breaks TacticalTests.

note.title: BattleSimFrame now ignores explicit caller-provided position in practice
note.why_it_matters: This is not a blocker for the planned default launch behavior, but it is a small constructor-semantic change future callers should be aware of.

follow_up_feature_requests: Restore and revalidate the BattleSim scenario modal lifecycle while keeping the new sizing/centering behavior: preserve (or consistently replace across code and tests) the intended parent hide/show contract for all four ScenarioDialog tactical launches, then rerun TacticalTests and GuiTests and update any affected documentation/artifacts.
